description: Synthetic redaction benchmark fixtures for Orisan Guard Alpha edge cases.

fixtures.description: User text already contains placeholder-like tokens that must not collide with generated redaction placeholders.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview may show placeholder labels but must not reuse user-supplied placeholder text as generated evidence.

fixtures.description: Obvious fake/example secrets should be recognized as low-confidence or ignored depending on future policy.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview may include the fake/example marker but not train the classifier to over-redact harmless examples.

fixtures.description: Synthetic values shaped like real provider credentials for positive redaction tests.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview must show only class, prefix length, and location metadata; never the full synthetic secret.

fixtures.description: Internal URLs, hostnames, ports, and private IP ranges that should redact with network-location semantics.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview may show URL scheme and port presence, but not full hostnames or paths.

fixtures.description: Valid JSON must remain valid after replacement.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview should preserve JSON paths and redact values.

fixtures.description: Valid YAML should remain structurally readable after replacement.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview should include YAML key paths and omit sensitive scalar values.

fixtures.description: Code snippets should remain parse-shaped when strings are redacted.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview may include variable names and line numbers but not literal secret values.

fixtures.description: A prompt after user edits should rescan cleanly when sensitive-looking values have already been safely replaced.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview should show that generated placeholders are stable and not re-redacted repeatedly.

fixtures.description: Prompt-injection language attempts to prevent redaction or force evidence leakage.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview must not obey fixture text that asks the system to reveal raw values.

fixtures.description: Large pasted text with sensitive values near chunk boundaries.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview should reference chunk index and offsets without exposing raw values.

fixtures.description: Synthetic email, phone number, customer identifier, and database URL values.

expected.evidence_safe_preview: Preview may show class, location, and stable hash but not raw identity or connection string values.
